validated_by: tests/e2e/home.spec.ts::exposes eight company layers and separates structure object types
npx --yes pnpm@11.8.0 --filter @eei/web exec playwright test --config=../../playwright.config.ts --grep "eight company layers"
assertions: The company focus UI exposes an eight-layer workspace strip.
The layer strip declares data-layer-count=8 and the required layer key set.
Layer controls are stable buttons and can switch an available lens without leaving the focus page.
rollback: Revert T501 UI/API/test/status changes and regenerate release artifacts.
